message:
fix(globalSearch): add missing .filter(Boolean) to word count calculation

Two occurrences in parseDocumentSections were missing the .filter(Boolean)
call when calculating word counts, causing potential off-by-one errors when
text contains leading/trailing whitespace. This aligns the implementation
with the correct pattern used elsewhere in the file (lines 143, 195, 215).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
